item.label: Show Content on Hover
item.description: Enable to visualize the content during hover.

item.label: Hover Animation
item.description: Choose animation type during the hover.

item.label: Hover Animation Speed
item.description: Set the time for the hover animation speed.

item.label: Social Links Hover Position
item.description: Select where you want to put social links icons during the hover.

item.label: Use Absolute Photo Position
item.description: If enabled the photo will be in absolute position according to its parent.

item.label: Photo Position
item.description: Select the placement of the photo.

item.label: Photo Offset X
item.description: Set horizontal absolute position value of the photo.

item.label: Photo Offset Y
item.description: Set vertical absolute position value of the photo.

item.label: Photo Width
item.description: Increase or decrease the width of member photo.

item.label: Photo Height
item.description: Increase or decrease the height of member photo.

item.label: Photo Alignment
item.description: Align photo to the left, right or center.

item.label: Photo Hover Animation
item.description: Select photo mouse hover animation.

item.label: Content Alignment
item.description: Align content to the left, right or center.

item.label: Content Padding
item.description: Padding adds extra space to the inside of the element.

item.label: Content Background
item.description: Pick a background color for the content area.

item.label: Icon Color
item.description: Here you can define a custom color for your icon.

item.label: Background
item.description: Here you can define a custom background color for your icon.

item.label: Spacing Between
item.description: Set how much space between social icons.

item.label: Top Spacing
item.description: Set how much space the icons will take from the top.

item.label: Height
item.description: Increase or decrease social icons box height.

item.label: Width
item.description: Increase or decrease social icons box width.

item.label: Icon Size
item.description: Control the size of the icon by increasing or decreasing the font size.

item.label: Border Radius
item.description: Here you can control the corner radius of social icons.

item.label: Spacing Bottom
item.description: Set how much space the element will take at the bottom.

item.label: Spacing Bottom
item.description: Set how much space the element will take at the bottom.

item.label: Overlay
item.description: Enable overlay on hover.

item.label: Speed
item.description: Set how long it will take for the overlay to be visible.

item.label: Icon
item.description: Select icon for the overlay.

item.label: Icon Color
item.description: Here you can define a custom color for your overlay icon.

item.label: Icon Size
item.description: Here you can define a icon size for your overlay icon.

item.label: Icon Opacity
item.description: Select the opacity of the overlay icon. Set the value from 0 - 1.

item.label: Website URL
item.description: Website URL of the team member.

item.label: Email Address
item.description: Email address of the team member.

item.label: Facebook URL
item.description: Facebook profile or page URL of the team member.

item.label: Twitter URL
item.description: Twitter account URL of the team member.

item.label: Instagram URL
item.description: Instagram account URL of the team member.

item.label: Linkedin URL
item.description: Linkedin profile URL of the team member.

item.label: Github URL
item.description: Github profile URL of the team member.

item.label: Behance URL
item.description: Behance profile URL of the team member.

item.label: Dribbble URL
item.description: Dribbble account URL of the team member.

item.label: Photo
item.description: Upload an image of the team member, or type in the URL to the image you would like to display for the team member.

item.label: Photo Alt Text
item.description: Define the HTML ALT text for your image here.

item.label: Member Name
item.description: The team member name.

item.label: Job Title
item.description: The job title or position of the team member.

item.label: Member Bio
item.description: Short biography of the team member.
